profile_basis: In-flight Cholesky storage bead was still represented by an uncommitted linalg.rs hunk. Saved RCH Criterion target dirs show the pre-lever baseline and candidate rebench for linalg/cholesky_128x128_f64.
lever_summary: Emit real F64 Cholesky results through TensorValue::new_f64_values instead of converting every output element through matrix_to_value's Literal path. Non-F64 dtypes keep matrix_to_value.

alien_graveyard.primitive: data-layout specialization / zero-copy typed output materialization
alien_graveyard.mapping: The numerical kernel already computes contiguous f64 output. The lever preserves that layout across the API boundary rather than rematerializing a Vec<Literal>.

change.lever: eval_cholesky_real_matrix now passes the computed Vec<f64> to cholesky_real_matrix_to_value; DType::F64 constructs a dense F64 tensor directly, all other dtypes delegate to matrix_to_value.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: cholesky_real_scalar / cholesky_real_blocked produce the same row-major Vec<f64>, and TensorValue::new_f64_values stores that Vec without reordering
isomorphism.floating_point: unchanged: extraction, Cholesky arithmetic order, blocked/scalar threshold, multiply-then-divide off-diagonal formula, NaN behavior, and dtype conversion for non-F64 are untouched
isomorphism.errors: unchanged for input validation and non-F64 output conversion; F64 output now uses TensorValue::new_f64_values with the same shape dimensions

validation.name: criterion_baseline
validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-axevw-baseline rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/cholesky_128x128_f64'
validation.result: baseline estimates from saved Criterion artifact: mean 668.297us [664.106, 673.976]

validation.name: criterion_candidate
validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-axevw-candidate rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/cholesky_128x128_f64'

validation.name: focused_cholesky_tests
validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-axevw-test rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture

validation.name: focused_cholesky_tests_final
validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-axevw-test-final rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
validation.result: passed after final source edits: 12 tests, including cholesky_f64_dense_output_matches_literal_materialization

validation.name: check_all_targets
validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-axevw-check rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets
validation.result: passed before cfg(test) cleanup, with one legacy dead-code warning for jacobi_eigendecomposition

validation.name: clippy_deny_warnings
validation.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-axevw-clippy rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
validation.result: passed after marking the legacy test reference jacobi_eigendecomposition as cfg(test)

validation.name: package_fmt_check
validation.result: blocked by pre-existing formatting drift across fj-lax benches and source files outside this pass; no broad formatter run

validation.name: ubs_touched_rust_file
validation.result: nonzero from existing linalg-wide inventories (panic/assert/index/unwrap); embedded UBS fmt, clippy, cargo check, cargo test --no-run, cargo audit, and cargo deny checks were clean

notes: The legacy max-pivot jacobi_eigendecomposition helper is used only by tests; this pass marks it cfg(test) so crate-scoped clippy -D warnings can run cleanly.
Package-level cargo fmt -p fj-lax --check is known to be blocked by unrelated pre-existing formatting drift across fj-lax; touched-file formatting is verified separately.
